emails.subject: New Master Swaps Agreements Database
emails.body: New Master Swaps Agreements Database Tana, I have had a request from Michael Khajeh-Noori, Deepak Sitlani (London) and Michael Schuh (Frankfurt) to access to the NEW Master Swap Agreements database, can you please confirm if they are allowed to access this database, and if so what level of access they should have. Thanks Regards Sandra Freeman European Notes Administration
